text: Hello? Are you there? Hi, this is Sarah. I'm reaching out because we pulled up your Medicare profile. As a talent, please record your message when you finish recording the hang of more friends. One for more options. We just need a quick confirmation from you so your coverage doesn't get interrupted. Just confirm for me. Do you have both Part A and Part B? So you do have Part A and A Medicare, right? To listen to your message, press 2. To erase and re-record, press 3. To continue recording where you left off, press 4.
